title: haplopappus acradenius
intro: Haplopappus acradenius, also known as the prickly goldeneye or the Arizona goldeneye, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus acradenius include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
